 {"id":"bd-3p6e","title":"[Harmonize] Migrate orphan sub-tasks to hierarchical IDs","description":"# [Harmonize] Migrate orphan sub-tasks to hierarchical IDs

## Purpose
Ensure all sub-tasks use hierarchical IDs following the {epic-id}.{n}.{m} pattern.

## Orphans to Migrate
- asupersync-8z9 → under n5o or xrc
- asupersync-ior → under n5o or xrc
- asupersync-9d3 → under n5o or xrc
- asupersync-c61 → under n5o or xrc

## Hierarchical ID Pattern
- EPIC: asupersync-{id}
- Sub-EPIC: asupersync-{epic}.{n}
- Task: asupersync-{epic}.{n}.{m}

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All orphan sub-tasks linked to parent EPICs
- [ ] New beads use hierarchical ID pattern
- [ ] `br show {epic}` shows complete child tree
- [ ] No floating sub-tasks without parent dependencies

## Verification
```bash
bv --robot-suggest | jq '.suggestions | map(select(.type == "orphan"))'
```","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:28:34.679412816Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T02:31:36.812205071Z","closed_at":"2026-01-23T02:31:36.812110173Z","close_reason":"Linked orphan tasks to asupersync-xrc as parent-child (8z9/ior/9d3/c61); verified no cycles","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3p6e","depends_on_id":"bd-zs64","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T06:20:45Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":10,"issue_id":"bd-3p6e","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added parent-child deps to asupersync-xrc for legacy tasks: asupersync-8z9, asupersync-ior, asupersync-9d3, asupersync-c61. Verified no cycles.","created_at":"2026-01-23T02:31:29Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3qc6","title":"Cancel-Aware Sync Primitives Verification Suite (unit tests, E2E)","description":"# Cancel-Aware Sync Primitives Verification Suite

## Purpose
Comprehensive verification for cancel-aware synchronization primitives (q48) ensuring correctness under cancellation and two-phase permit semantics.

## Test Categories

### 1. Unit Tests
- Mutex: lock, try_lock, cancel-during-wait
- RwLock: read, write, upgrade, downgrade
- Semaphore: acquire, try_acquire, two-phase permits
- Barrier: wait, reset
- Notify: notify_one, notify_all, notify_waiters
- OnceCell: get_or_init, get_or_try_init

### 2. E2E Scenarios
| Scenario | Verifies |
|----------|----------|
| Mutex contention | Fair queuing, no starvation |
| RwLock readers | Concurrent read access |
| RwLock writer priority | Writer preference |
| Semaphore permits | Count accuracy |
| Semaphore two-phase | Reserve/commit/abort |
| Barrier sync | All tasks reach barrier |
| Notify wake ordering | FIFO wake semantics |
| OnceCell race | Single initialization |

### 3. Cancel-Safety Tests
- Cancel while waiting for mutex: no leak
- Cancel while holding permit: proper release
- Cancel during barrier wait: barrier reset
- Cancel during semaphore reserve: abort semantics

### 4. Stress Tests
- High contention scenarios
- Many waiters, few resources
- Rapid acquire/release cycles
- Mixed read/write patterns

### 5. Deadlock Detection Tests
- Cycle detection in lock graphs
- Priority inversion scenarios
- Lab runtime deadlock oracle

## Logging Requirements
- Lock events logged with task IDs
- On failure: dump waiter queues, lock state
- Contention metrics: wait times, queue lengths

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All primitives have unit tests
- [ ] Cancel-safety verified for all operations
- [ ] No deadlocks in stress tests
- [ ] Two-phase permits work correctly
- [ ] `cargo test sync` passes deterministically

## Verification Commands
```bash
cargo test --package asupersync --lib sync
cargo test --test sync_e2e
```","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"MagentaReef","created_at":"2026-01-22T19:47:57.306837602Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T03:34:21.891711941Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3qc6","depends_on_id":"asupersync-q48","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T06:20:45Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"bd-4rpn","title":"[Harmonize] Fix priority alignments","description":"# [Harmonize] Fix priority alignments

## Purpose
Ensure priority follows dependency order: parent EPICs have priority ≤ child priorities.

## Issues Fixed
- xrc (Phase 1) was P2, now P1 (blocks ds8 which is P2)
- 90l9 (P0 duplicate) closed/merged into ds8

## Rule
Priority must respect dependencies:
- If A blocks B, then priority(A) ≤ priority(B)
- P0 = Critical, P1 = High, P2 = Medium, P3 = Low, P4 = Backlog

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No priority inversions in dependency graph
- [ ] `bv --robot-priority` shows no misalignments
- [ ] All xrc.* sub-tasks have P1 priority
- [ ] Parent EPICs never have higher priority number than children

## Verification
```bash
bv --robot-priority | jq '.recommendations'  # Should be empty or acceptable
```","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ClaudeOpus45","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:28:29.875907033Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T03:14:34.794684288Z","closed_at":"2026-01-23T02:35:47.483747422Z","close_reason":"Fixed priority inversions:
- 14o: P0→P1 (match P1 dependencies)
- w9rc: P0→P1 (blocked by 14o)
- 4qw: P2→P1 (match P1 children)
- 4ul: P1→P2 (blocked by ds8)
- 6ll,9mq: P1→P3 (blocked by P3 items)
- y1p,0vx,ucq,zfn: P1→P2 (cascading fixes)
- tpru: P2→P3, brm: P2→P3, ou7o: P2→P3, 3nm: P2→P3
- z8n,5jm,m76: P1→P2 (blocked by 4ul)
No cycles detected. Core xrc.* tasks are P1, stretch goals (xrc.5,xrc.6) appropriately P3/P4.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-4rpn","depends_on_id":"bd-zs64","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T06:20:45Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":11,"issue_id":"bd-4rpn","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Ran a priority inversion scan against .beads/issues.jsonl: 42 inversions where a blocker has lower priority (numerically higher). Notables: asupersync-xrc P1 blocks bd-hzrb P0 (also asupersync-n5o P1 blocks bd-hzrb P0), asupersync-akx.2.2 P1 blocks asupersync-akx.2 P0, asupersync-jdg P1 blocks asupersync-akx.7 P0, asupersync-0a0 P2 blocks multiple P1 tasks (4v1/573/9r7/h10/uls/xtx), asupersync-r2n P2 blocks 4v1/9r7/fxd P1. Full list available on request.","created_at":"2026-01-23T03:14:34Z"}]}
